default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: I'm Rui. You've come for me at last.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: I'm beginning to see it more clearly.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I've got a brilliant plan. Follow my lead.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

default.title: Victory
default.text: Well done. Is everyone alright?

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: What a pity. Let's go back to the drawing board.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Flawless execution. Just as planned.

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: I'm asking you, please.

default.title: Greeting
default.text: I'm beginning to see it more clearly.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: You seem to be in a good mood. Did... something good happen?

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: I've got a brilliant plan.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Follow my lead.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Flawless execution.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Just as planned.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: The pieces are falling into place.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: Aren't you full of surprises? I appreciate the initiative.

default.title: Idle
default.text: You've come for me at last.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Oh? Such persistent attention.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Such an honor. I'll do my best to live up to it.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Sure, I was getting a little bored anyway.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Target secured. The next move... is your call.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Hehe, the pieces are falling into place.

kisugi_rui_-_rank_up.title: Pat Head
kisugi_rui_-_rank_up.text: Oh my... are you sure you've got the right person?

tipsy_nocturne.title: Attire Obtained
tipsy_nocturne.text: Be honest now... do you think it fits me?

tipsy_nocturne.title: Level Up
tipsy_nocturne.text: You won't let me down, will you?

tipsy_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 1
tipsy_nocturne.text: Just staring at me won't get you anywhere, you know.

tipsy_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 2
tipsy_nocturne.text: Can you hear me? Hehe... look at you... so cute.

tipsy_nocturne.title: Idle
tipsy_nocturne.text: This night is taking a pleasant turn... Not bad at all.

tipsy_nocturne.title: Annoyed
tipsy_nocturne.text: Hehe... Just how much of that is a joke, I wonder.

tipsy_nocturne.title: Special Attention
tipsy_nocturne.text: We've bridged quite a distance tonight, you and I.
